Skyes Over London · Operator Handoff

SkyeQuantaCore-TheHybrid-AutonomousIDE Operator Start Surface

This is the non-expert start surface. Use the one-command operator path first. Do not jump into raw internal bins.

./START_HERE.sh

Do this first

  1. Open config/env-template-pack/deploy.env.example and copy the values you need into .env.local.
  2. Run ./START_HERE.sh.
  3. Only hand off the package if the report finishes green.
